title: phyllostegia glabra var. glabra
intro: Phyllostegia glabra var. glabra, also known as Smooth Phyllostegia or Hawaiian Liatris, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds, and is believed to offer benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved skin health. Phyllostegia glabra var. glabra can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
